meta.name: Nadeem Mohamed Soliman
meta.title: Software Engineer
meta.tagline: Building backend systems, data pipelines, and AI applications.

about.summary: Senior Computer Science and Engineering student at the German University in Cairo, graduating June 2026 with an A+ Bachelor's degree. I have shipped backend systems, data pipelines, and AI applications across banking, logistics, and enterprise software. I focus on building services that hold up under load, pipelines that don't need babysitting, and code that the next engineer can actually understand.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering and Science
education.gpaNote: Top of class — German grading scale where 1.0 is the highest possible grade

thesis.title: Vision Transformer Framework for Vehicle Intention Prediction
thesis.description: Trained a Vision Transformer (ViT) to predict vehicle maneuvers in autonomous driving scenarios, beating Uber's baseline LSTM model by 52.9%.

bullets: Built an embedded Shopify app in Remix, React, and Node.js connecting merchant stores to a logistics backend via Shopify Webhooks and GraphQL.
Shipped bulk waybill generation cutting manual processing time by 80% across all merchant accounts.
Contributed to a courier management service on Bun, Hono, Clerk, MongoDB, and Next.js for real-time order tracking.
Built a customer communication service on Meta Cloud API handling inbound/outbound messaging and HMAC-verified webhooks.
Unified WhatsApp, SMS, and email into a single modular TypeScript backend using inheritance and polymorphism.
Built Spring Boot microservices for a virtual banking platform with Apache Kafka for async messaging.
Wired in WSO2 API Gateway for authenticated, rate-limited external routing.
Delivered REST APIs with OAuth 2.0 authentication and role-based access control.
Integrated Keycloak SSO into OpenKM, consolidating identity management in a Dockerized MSSQL environment.
Built automated backup and recovery pipelines using Rclone for compliance and disaster recovery.
Wrote deployment documentation that cut engineer ramp-up time by 60%.
Built an automated quality tracking system in VBA (Excel and Access) replacing a fully manual process.
Cut data entry time by 70% while improving reporting accuracy.
Built a customer survey platform in Java, XHTML, and MySQL for branch teams to collect and review structured feedback.
Completed structured training in IBM DataPower API Gateway configuration, ACH payment processing, and enterprise banking security protocols.
Delivered a full-stack MERN banking app with user authentication, account management, and transaction history end-to-end in one month.

projects.title: Vision Transformer for Autonomous Vehicle Intention Prediction
projects.description: Trained a ViT to predict vehicle maneuvers, beating Uber's LSTM baseline by 52.9% on Argoverse 2.
bullets: Beat Uber's baseline LSTM model by 52.9%.
Handled data preprocessing and temporal feature extraction on the Argoverse 2 dataset.

projects.title: Massively Scalable Food Delivery Platform (Talabat-like)
projects.description: Microservices-based food delivery backend with per-service databases, eventing, caching, and Kubernetes deployment.
bullets: Contributed to a distributed food delivery backend across microservices for customers, restaurants, and drivers, each with its own database communicating through explicit APIs.
Owned the User Service: JWT auth, BCrypt password hashing, and role-based access control for CUSTOMER and ADMIN roles.
Used the Observer pattern to plug MongoDB audit logging into the event layer without touching business logic.
Added Redis caching with TTL expiration and write-through invalidation to cut unnecessary database calls.
Replaced shared-table SQL joins with Feign clients to OrderService and CheckoutService for order summaries, active-order checks, and payment totals.

Published "user.registered" and "user.deactivated" events over RabbitMQ, and wrote idempotent Saga consumers to update user stats on "order.completed" / "order.cancelled", with a DLQ and three-attempt retry.
Deployed the User Service on Kubernetes with health probes, a headless StatefulSet for Postgres, and separate ConfigMap and Secret manifests.
Added Prometheus metrics, structured Loki4J logs with correlationId/userId MDC fields, and a Grafana dashboard with three PromQL panels.

projects.title: Agentic NDA Contract Analysis System
projects.description: Agentic contract review pipeline combining fine-tuned LLMs, semantic search, and orchestration for reliable legal classifications.
bullets: Contributed to a 5-member team building an agentic contract review pipeline with reasoning, policy, orchestration, and logging components.
Fine-tuned a Qwen model using QLoRA on the ContractNLI benchmark to classify 17 legal hypotheses per contract as ENTAILED, CONTRADICTED, or NOT MENTIONED.
Built the vector embedding layer for semantic search over contract clauses.

projects.title: DDoS Mitigation Tool
projects.description: End-to-end DDoS detection and graduated mitigation pipeline with kernel-level enforcement and recovery.
bullets: Contributed to an end-to-end DDoS detection and mitigation pipeline as the Mitigation & Firewall engineer on a four-person team.
Built a graduated response engine stepping traffic through MONITOR → SOFT_RATE_LIMIT → BLOCK based on consecutive attack windows, with automatic recovery when traffic normalizes.
Implemented a token bucket rate limiter with per-IP and global limits, burst allowance, and dynamic tightening under escalating attacks.
Wrote an IP scoring system using z-score deviation and consistency history to target sustained attackers rather than blocking all high-traffic sources.
Integrated with Linux iptables for kernel-level packet dropping, with whitelist support and dry-run fallback when root access is unavailable.

projects.title: Athletic Tournament Management System
projects.description: Digital tournament management system for the German University in Cairo covering both students and staff, with comprehensive project documentation.
bullets: Contributed to the planning phase of a digital tournament management system for GUC students and staff.
Delivered a Project Charter, Scope Statement, and a three-level Work Breakdown Structure with 10+ sub-activities.
Mapped stakeholder interests and set up a Jira board simulation translating WBS elements into epics, tasks, and subtasks with owners and dependencies.

projects.title: Real-Time Stock Analytics Platform
projects.description: End-to-end data pipeline with Kafka/PySpark streaming, Airflow orchestration, PostgreSQL storage, and a GenAI Text-to-SQL agent with Apache Superset dashboards.
bullets: Contributed to a data pipeline using Airflow for orchestration and Kafka with PySpark for real-time market data streaming.
Stored processed data in PostgreSQL, helped integrate a LangChain Text-to-SQL agent, and built dashboards with Apache Superset.

projects.title: Graph-RAG Travel Assistant
projects.description: Knowledge graph from 50,000+ hotel reviews with Cypher-based retrieval, named entity recognition, SHAP/LIME explainability, and a Streamlit frontend.
bullets: Contributed to a knowledge graph built from 50,000+ hotel reviews, with Cypher-based retrieval, named entity recognition, and a Streamlit frontend.
Helped design the retrieval layer combining vector similarity search with graph traversal to ground LLM answers in structured data. Added SHAP and LIME explainability to the ML models.

projects.title: All-in-One Vacation Platform
projects.description: Full-stack travel booking platform with flight/hotel search, promo codes, Stripe payments, and Amadeus live booking integration.
bullets: Contributed to a full-stack travel booking platform where users can search flights and hotels, apply promo codes, and get personalized recommendations.
Worked in an Agile team integrating Stripe for payments and Amadeus for live booking data.

projects.title: Embedded Auto Lane Detection
projects.description: Real-time lane detection system in C interfacing directly with hardware drivers for autonomous navigation.
bullets: Contributed to a real-time lane detection system in C that interfaced with hardware drivers to support autonomous navigation on an embedded platform.

projects.title: University Academic System and Portal
projects.description: Academic management system with 50+ stored procedures, views, triggers, and a role-based web portal for students, advisors, and administrators.
bullets: Contributed to an academic management system with a normalized relational schema and 50+ stored procedures, views, triggers, and functions covering registration, graduation checks, and probation rules.
Helped build a role-based web portal for students, advisors, and administrators.

projects.title: Donation Ecosystem Platform
projects.description: Platform connecting donors with NGOs, with responsive and accessible interface for seamless giving experiences.
bullets: Contributed to a platform connecting donors with NGOs, took part in requirements gathering, and helped deliver a responsive React prototype.

projects.title: The Last of Us: Legacy Game Engine
projects.description: Turn-based survival game in Java demonstrating OOP principles, MVC architecture, and comprehensive exception handling.
bullets: Contributed to a turn-based survival game in Java using OOP and MVC, with a custom GUI, grid-based map, and exception handling.

certifications.title: Essential Google Cloud Infrastructure: Core Services

bullets: Led the technical program, coordinating a team to plan and run 36 technical sessions across the academic year.
Nearly 50 students learned from the program.
Ran weekly Python lab sessions for 20+ students covering data structures, algorithms, and OOP.
